name: newsapi-everything
description: Search millions of news articles and blog posts from over 150,000 sources worldwide. Full-text search with date ranges, language filters, and sorting. Use for questions like 'news about AI regulation', 'articles about climate change this week', 'what happened with the Boeing strike', 'recent coverage of SpaceX'. Best for searching specific topics across all sources.

input.description: Query parameters as JSON. 'q' is the primary search field. Supports advanced syntax: quotes for exact match, +/- for must/must-not, AND/OR/NOT operators.

q.description: Search keywords or phrase (max 500 chars). Supports: exact match with quotes, +/- prefix, AND/OR/NOT operators.

searchIn.description: Restrict search to: title, description, content (comma-separated)

language.description: 2-letter language code: ar, de, en, es, fr, he, it, nl, no, pt, ru, sv, zh

output.description: JSON with 'status', 'totalResults', and 'articles' array. Each article has 'source' (id, name), 'author', 'title', 'description', 'url', 'urlToImage', 'publishedAt', 'content'.
